name: PEASS-ng
description: LinPEAS/WinPEAS scripts that search hosts for local privilege-escalation paths. Tool: https://github.com/peass-ng/PEASS-ng. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #195 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map PEASS-ng output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved PEASS-ng output file to parse instead of running it live.
